overrides.expect: \psi_ {\mathrm{q}} (\mathbf {r}, \sigma) = \phi_ {\mathrm{q}} (x, y) \exp (\mathrm{i} k z) \times \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} \alpha & \text {for m_{s} = 1 / 2} \\ \beta & \text {for m_{s} = -1 / 2} \end{array} \right.

\begin{array}{l} \text {[ r . p , H ] = [ (x p _ {x} + y p _ {y} + z p _ {z}) , \frac {1}{2 m} (p _ {x} ^ {2} + p _ {y} ^ {2} + p _ {z} ^ {2}) + V (x , y , z) ]} \\ \qquad = \frac {\mathrm{i} \hbar}{m} (p _ {x} ^ {2} + p _ {y} ^ {2} + p _ {z} ^ {2}) - \mathrm{i} \hbar \left(x \frac {\partial V}{\partial x} + y \frac {\partial V}{\partial y} + z \frac {\partial V}{\partial z}\right) \\ \qquad = 2 \mathrm{i} \hbar T - \mathrm{i} \hbar (\mathbf {r}. \nabla V) \end{array}
